`{ _, _ -> }` is an implicit SAM conversion, so the instance you are removing here will not match anything. To fix this, use for example `val onRequestPermissionResultListener = OnRequestPermissionResultListener { _, _ -> }` and add and remove the `onRequestPermissionResultListener` val instead.

<string name="import_structure_guide_content">Esta é a estrutura de diretórios do “pacote de importação” (dentro do ZIP ou arquivo selecionado), não o armazenamento interno do aplicativo. 

DragonBones (.zip)
 my_dragonbones.zip
 any_folder_name/
 hero_ske.json
 hero_tex.json
 hero_tex.png
 Requisito: o prefixo do nome do arquivo ske/tex json/png é consistente. 

WebP (.zip)
 my_webp.zip
 any_folder_name/
 idle.webp
 talk.webp
 happy.webp
 Requisito: Contém pelo menos um arquivo .webp. 

MP4
 Caminho A (arquivo direto):
 avatar.mp4
 Caminho B (.zip):
 my_mp4.zip
 any_folder_name/
 idle.mp4
 talk.mp4
 happy.mp4
 Requisito: Contém pelo menos um arquivo .mp4. 

MMD (.zip)
 my_mmd.zip
 any_folder_name/
 character.pmx (ou .pmd)
 motions/idle.vmd (opcional)
 texturas/...
 Requisito: Mantenha os caminhos relativos das referências PMX/PMD inalterados. 

glTF
 Caminho A (arquivo direto):
 avatar.glb
 Caminho B (glTF de vários arquivos usando .zip):
 my_gltf.zip
 any_folder_name/
 avatar.gltf
 avatar.bin
 texturas/...
 Requisito: Mantenha o caminho relativo da referência .gltf inalterado. 

FBX
 Método A (arquivo direto, somente recursos independentes):
 avatar.fbx
 Método B (texturas/recursos externos, use .zip):
 my_fbx.zip
 any_folder_name/
 avatar.fbx
 texturas/...
 Requisito: Carregar diretamente .fbx Somente recursos incorporados são suportados; se o modelo fizer referência a texturas externas ou outros recursos, mantenha o caminho relativo e coloque-o em ZIP.</string>

<string name="import_structure_guide_content">이 내용은 앱 내부 저장소가 아니라 가져오기 패키지의 구조입니다(ZIP 안의 파일 또는 선택한 파일 기준).

DragonBones(.zip)
 my_dragonbones.zip
 any_folder_name/
 hero_ske.json
 hero_tex.json
 hero_tex.png
 요구 사항: ske/tex json/png 파일은 같은 파일명 접두사를 사용해야 합니다.

WebP(.zip)
 my_webp.zip
 any_folder_name/
 idle.webp
 talking.webp
 happy.webp
 요구 사항: .webp 파일을 하나 이상 포함해야 합니다.

MP4
 방식 A(직접 파일):
 avatar.mp4
 방식 B(.zip):
 my_mp4.zip
 any_folder_name/
 idle.mp4
 talking.mp4
 happy.mp4
 요구 사항: .mp4 파일을 하나 이상 포함해야 합니다.

MMD(.zip)
 my_mmd.zip
 any_folder_name/
 character.pmx(또는 .pmd)
 motions/idle.vmd(선택 사항)
 textures/...
 요구 사항: PMX/PMD가 참조하는 상대 경로를 변경하지 않아야 합니다.

glTF
 방식 A(직접 파일):
 avatar.glb
 방식 B(여러 파일로 된 glTF는 .zip 사용):
 my_gltf.zip
 any_folder_name/
 avatar.gltf
 avatar.bin
 textures/...
 요구 사항: .gltf가 참조하는 상대 경로를 변경하지 않아야 합니다.

FBX
 방식 A(직접 파일, 자체 포함 리소스만):
 avatar.fbx
 방식 B(외부 텍스처/리소스는 .zip 사용):
 my_fbx.zip
 any_folder_name/
 avatar.fbx
 textures/...
 요구 사항: .fbx 직접 업로드는 내장 리소스만 지원합니다. 모델이 외부 텍스처나 다른 리소스를 참조하는 경우 상대 경로를 유지한 채 모두 ZIP으로 묶어 주세요.</string>

<string name="import_structure_guide_content">Ini adalah struktur direktori untuk "pakej import" (ZIP atau dalam fail yang dipilih), bukan storan dalaman aplikasi.

DragonBones (.zip)
 my_dragonbones.zip
 any_folder_name/
 hero_ske.json
 hero_tex.json
 hero_tex.png
 Keperluan: Awalan nama fail ske/tex json/png mesti sama.

WebP (.zip)
 my_webp.zip
 any_folder_name/
 idle.webp
 talking.webp
 happy.webp
 Keperluan: Mesti mengandungi sekurang-kurangnya satu fail .webp.

MP4
 Kaedah A (fail terus):
 avatar.mp4
 Kaedah B (.zip):
 my_mp4.zip
 any_folder_name/
 idle.mp4
 talking.mp4
 happy.mp4
 Keperluan: Mesti mengandungi sekurang-kurangnya satu fail .mp4.

MMD (.zip)
 my_mmd.zip
 any_folder_name/
 character.pmx (atau .pmd)
 motions/idle.vmd (pilihan)
 textures/...
 Keperluan: Kekalkan laluan relatif yang dirujuk oleh PMX/PMD.

glTF
 Kaedah A (fail terus):
 avatar.glb
 Kaedah B (glTF berbilang fail guna .zip):
 my_gltf.zip
 any_folder_name/
 avatar.gltf
 avatar.bin
 textures/...
 Keperluan: Kekalkan laluan relatif yang dirujuk oleh .gltf.

FBX
 Kaedah A (fail terus, hanya sumber terbenam):
 avatar.fbx
 Kaedah B (guna .zip untuk tekstur/sumber luaran):
 my_fbx.zip
 any_folder_name/
 avatar.fbx
 textures/...
 Keperluan: Muat naik langsung .fbx hanya menyokong sumber terbenam; jika model merujuk tekstur luaran atau sumber lain, kekalkan laluan relatif dan masukkan ke dalam ZIP.</string>

<string name="import_structure_guide_content">这是“导入包”的目录结构（ZIP 或选中文件内部），不是应用内部存储。

DragonBones（.zip）
 my_dragonbones.zip
 any_folder_name/
 hero_ske.json
 hero_tex.json
 hero_tex.png
 要求：ske/tex json/png 文件名前缀一致。

WebP（.zip）
 my_webp.zip
 any_folder_name/
 idle.webp
 talking.webp
 happy.webp
 要求：至少包含一个 .webp 文件。

MP4
 方式 A（直接文件）:
 avatar.mp4
 方式 B（.zip）:
 my_mp4.zip
 any_folder_name/
 idle.mp4
 talking.mp4
 happy.mp4
 要求：至少包含一个 .mp4 文件。

MMD（.zip）
 my_mmd.zip
 any_folder_name/
 character.pmx（或 .pmd）
 motions/idle.vmd（可选）
 textures/...
 要求：保持 PMX/PMD 引用的相对路径不变。

glTF
 方式 A（直接文件）:
 avatar.glb
 方式 B（多文件 glTF 使用 .zip）:
 my_gltf.zip
 any_folder_name/
 avatar.gltf
 avatar.bin
 textures/...
 要求：保持 .gltf 引用的相对路径不变。

FBX
 方式 A（直接文件，仅限自包含资源）:
 avatar.fbx
 方式 B（外置贴图/资源请使用 .zip）:
 my_fbx.zip
 any_folder_name/
 avatar.fbx
 textures/...
 要求：直接上传 .fbx 仅支持内嵌资源；若模型引用外置贴图或其他资源，请保持相对路径并放进 ZIP。</string>

<string name="import_structure_guide_content">This is the IMPORT PACKAGE layout (files inside your ZIP / picked file), not app internal storage.

DragonBones (.zip)
 my_dragonbones.zip
 any_folder_name/
 hero_ske.json
 hero_tex.json
 hero_tex.png
 Requirement: ske/tex json/png files must share the same filename prefix.

WebP (.zip)
 my_webp.zip
 any_folder_name/
 idle.webp
 talking.webp
 happy.webp
 Requirement: include at least one .webp file.

MP4
 Method A (direct file):
 avatar.mp4
 Method B (.zip):
 my_mp4.zip
 any_folder_name/
 idle.mp4
 talking.mp4
 happy.mp4
 Requirement: include at least one .mp4 file.

MMD (.zip)
 my_mmd.zip
 any_folder_name/
 character.pmx (or .pmd)
 motions/idle.vmd (optional)
 textures/...
 Requirement: keep relative paths referenced by PMX/PMD unchanged.

glTF
 Method A (direct file):
 avatar.glb
 Method B (.zip for multi-file glTF):
 my_gltf.zip
 any_folder_name/
 avatar.gltf
 avatar.bin
 textures/...
 Requirement: keep relative paths referenced by .gltf unchanged.

FBX
 Method A (direct file, self-contained assets only):
 avatar.fbx
 Method B (use .zip for external textures/resources):
 my_fbx.zip
 any_folder_name/
 avatar.fbx
 textures/...
 Requirement: direct .fbx upload only supports embedded resources; if the model references external textures or other assets, keep the relative paths and package everything in ZIP.</string>
<string name="enter_preferences">Masukkan deskripsi pribadi Anda di sini...</string>

<string name="import_structure_guide_content">Ini adalah struktur direktori "paket impor" (ZIP atau di dalam file yang dipilih), bukan penyimpanan internal aplikasi.

DragonBones (.zip)
 my_dragonbones.zip
 any_folder_name/
 hero_ske.json
 hero_tex.json
 hero_tex.png
 Persyaratan: awalan nama file ske/tex json/png harus sama.

WebP (.zip)
 my_webp.zip
 any_folder_name/
 idle.webp
 talking.webp
 happy.webp
 Persyaratan: setidaknya berisi satu file .webp.

MP4
 Metode A (file langsung):
 avatar.mp4
 Metode B (.zip):
 my_mp4.zip
 any_folder_name/
 idle.mp4
 talking.mp4
 happy.mp4
 Persyaratan: setidaknya berisi satu file .mp4.

MMD (.zip)
 my_mmd.zip
 any_folder_name/
 character.pmx (atau .pmd)
 motions/idle.vmd (opsional)
 textures/...
 Persyaratan: pertahankan jalur relatif yang dirujuk oleh PMX/PMD.

glTF
 Metode A (file langsung):
 avatar.glb
 Metode B (glTF multi-file gunakan .zip):
 my_gltf.zip
 any_folder_name/
 avatar.gltf
 avatar.bin
 textures/...
 Persyaratan: pertahankan jalur relatif yang dirujuk oleh .gltf.

FBX
 Metode A (file langsung, hanya untuk aset yang mandiri):
 avatar.fbx
 Metode B (untuk tekstur/aset eksternal gunakan .zip):
 my_fbx.zip
 any_folder_name/
 avatar.fbx
 textures/...
 Persyaratan: unggah langsung .fbx hanya mendukung aset tertanam; jika model merujuk tekstur eksternal atau aset lain, pertahankan jalur relatif dan masukkan ke ZIP.</string>

<string name="import_structure_guide_content">Esta es la estructura de directorios del "paquete de importación" (ZIP o archivo seleccionado internamente), no el almacenamiento interno de la aplicación.

DragonBones (.zip)
 my_dragonbones.zip
 any_folder_name/
 hero_ske.json
 hero_tex.json
 hero_tex.png
 Requisito: los nombres de archivo ske/tex json/png deben tener el mismo prefijo.

WebP (.zip)
 my_webp.zip
 any_folder_name/
 idle.webp
 talking.webp
 happy.webp
 Requisito: al menos un archivo .webp.

MP4
 Método A (archivo directo):
 avatar.mp4
 Método B (.zip):
 my_mp4.zip
 any_folder_name/
 idle.mp4
 talking.mp4
 happy.mp4
 Requisito: al menos un archivo .mp4.

MMD (.zip)
 my_mmd.zip
 any_folder_name/
 character.pmx (o .pmd)
 motions/idle.vmd (opcional)
 textures/...
 Requisito: mantener las rutas relativas referenciadas por PMX/PMD.

glTF
 Método A (archivo directo):
 avatar.glb
 Método B (glTF de múltiples archivos usando .zip):
 my_gltf.zip
 any_folder_name/
 avatar.gltf
 avatar.bin
 textures/...
 Requisito: mantener las rutas relativas referenciadas por .gltf.

FBX
 Método A (archivo directo, solo recursos autocontenidos):
 avatar.fbx
 Método B (texturas/recursos externos usar .zip):
 my_fbx.zip
 any_folder_name/
 avatar.fbx
 textures/...
 Requisito: la carga directa de .fbx solo admite recursos incrustados; si el modelo referencia texturas externas u otros recursos, mantenga las rutas relativas y colóquelos en un ZIP.</string>
